when.sentence: DISCUSSION: Why is PGI useful when you choose a bottle of wine?

matters.sentence: DISCUSSION: Which matters more for style, region or grape variety?

variety.simpleMeaning: A kind of thing in a group
variety.contextMeaning: A type of grape, different from other grapes
variety.sentence: DISCUSSION: Which matters more for style, region or grape variety?

add.simpleMeaning: Put more in or make bigger
add.contextMeaning: Help make the wine seem more important or better
add.sentence: DISCUSSION: How do underground cellars add value to Moldovan wine?

value.simpleMeaning: How good or useful something is
value.contextMeaning: Extra importance or worth for the wine
value.sentence: DISCUSSION: How do underground cellars add value to Moldovan wine?

own.contextMeaning: The dinner that is yours, not someone else's
own.sentence: DISCUSSION: Which Moldovan style would you choose for your own dinner, and why?

speaking.contextMeaning: Talking about the topic out loud
speaking.sentence: SPEAKING: Explain the Codru chain in 2 or 3 sentences: cooler region, slower ripening, higher acidity, fresher wine.

explain.simpleMeaning: Say something so it is easy to understand
explain.contextMeaning: Tell the idea in simple words
explain.sentence: SPEAKING: Explain the Codru chain in 2 or 3 sentences: cooler region, slower ripening, higher acidity, fresher wine.

chain.simpleMeaning: Things joined together in a line
chain.contextMeaning: A connected group of places or steps
chain.sentence: SPEAKING: Explain the Codru chain in 2 or 3 sentences: cooler region, slower ripening, higher acidity, fresher wine.

sentences.simpleMeaning: Small groups of words that say one idea
sentences.contextMeaning: Two or three short lines of speaking or writing
sentences.sentence: SPEAKING: Explain the Codru chain in 2 or 3 sentences: cooler region, slower ripening, higher acidity, fresher wine.

higher.contextMeaning: More than before; at a bigger level
higher.sentence: SPEAKING: Explain the Codru chain in 2 or 3 sentences: cooler region, slower ripening, higher acidity, fresher wine.

compare.simpleMeaning: Look at two things and see how they are different
compare.contextMeaning: Say how the two places are alike and different
compare.sentence: SPEAKING: Compare Stefan Voda and Valul lui Traian in 2 or 3 clear sentences.

recommend.simpleMeaning: Say something is a good choice
recommend.contextMeaning: Suggest one bottle that fits the food
recommend.sentence: SPEAKING: Recommend one Moldovan bottle for fish, roast meat, or a lighter summer meal.

closing.simpleMeaning: The last part at the end
closing.contextMeaning: The final part of the lesson or talk
closing.sentence: [CLOSING] Moldova gives a useful technical lesson in simple English.
